bird.summary: The rufous-capped motmot (Baryphthengus ruficapillus) is a species of bird in the family Momotidae. It is found in Argentina, Brazil, and P…

locations.name: 原始森林
locations.summary: 原始森林又稱原生林，是指一个森林已经达到非常非常长久的年龄而没有遭到显著的干扰，成功表现出独特的生态特征，并可能被归类为顶极群落。原生特性包括多样化的树有关的结构，提供多样化的野生动物栖息地，增加了森林生态系统的生物多样性。多样化的树结构…

relations.subject: Rufous-capped motmot
relations.evidence: It inhabits primary and gallery forest, the latter mostly along watercourses

relations.subject: Rufous-capped motmot
relations.evidence: The IUCN has assessed the rufous-capped motmot as being of Least Concern. Though it has a large range, appears to have a large population, and occurs in many protected areas, deforestation elsewhere is causing its population to decline
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
